user_admissions_revocation_check.name: user_admissions_revocation_check
user_admissions_revocation_check.value: ("user_admissions"."status" = 'active' AND "user_admissions"."revoked_at" IS NULL) OR ("user_admissions"."status" = 'revoked' AND "user_admissions"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL)

environments_preview_opt_down_evidence_c.name: environments_preview_opt_down_evidence_check
environments_preview_opt_down_evidence_c.value: "environments"."lifecycle_stage" <> 'preview' OR "environments"."is_protected" = true OR ("environments"."preview_non_production_confirmed_at" IS NOT NULL AND "environments"."preview_non_production_confirmed_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL)

environments_preview_opt_down_fields_sco.name: environments_preview_opt_down_fields_scope_check
environments_preview_opt_down_fields_sco.value: ("environments"."preview_non_production_confirmed_at" IS NULL AND "environments"."preview_non_production_confirmed_by_user_id" IS NULL) OR "environments"."lifecycle_stage" = 'preview'

protected_changes_requester_present_chec.name: protected_changes_requester_present_check
protected_changes_requester_present_chec.value: "protected_changes"."requester_user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "protected_changes"."requester_machine_identity_id" IS NOT NULL

injection_grants_issued_actor_shape_chec.name: injection_grants_issued_actor_shape_check
injection_grants_issued_actor_shape_chec.value:
("injection_grants"."issued_actor_type" = 'user' AND "injection_grants"."issued_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "injection_grants"."issued_machine_identity_id" IS NULL AND "injection_grants"."issued_runtime_policy_key_id" IS NULL)
      OR
      ("injection_grants"."issued_actor_type" = 'machine' AND "injection_grants"."issued_user_id" IS NULL AND "injection_grants"."issued_machine_identity_id" IS NOT NULL)

secret_syncs_github_actions_target_check.name: secret_syncs_github_actions_target_check
secret_syncs_github_actions_target_check.value: "secret_syncs"."kind" <> 'github-actions' OR ("secret_syncs"."target_repo_id" IS NOT NULL AND "secret_syncs"."github_provider_scope" IS NOT NULL AND ("secret_syncs"."github_provider_scope" = 'repository' OR "secret_syncs"."target_github_environment_id" IS NOT NULL))
